nodes.label: AI for professional polish and efficiency
nodes.label_negative: AI for creative and personal expression

nodes.grounding_span: I don't want my voice to become like AI

nodes.label: Professional competence and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I was able to get done in a few minutes

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: I want it to sound like me, even if there are awkwardly-worded sentences

nodes.label: Educational effectiveness and student understanding
nodes.grounding_span: student performance on them is the best test of whether or not I did my job of teaching well

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for rote tasks
